name: Attribute POP
description: The Attribute POP lets you: * Create new attributes * Rename attributes * Duplicate attributes * Delete attributes * Create matrix attributes Refer to [[Attribute]]. When you create a new attribute, you specify: * the name (choose from built-in pre-defined names, or create your own) * the type (float, double, int, uint) * the number of components in the attribute (1, 2, 3 or 4 only). Examples: ** A float type with 3 components is therefore a float3. ** A double with 2 components is a double2. ** An int with 4 components is an ivec4. ** A uint with 3 components is a uint3. * arrays of the above, for example create a array of 8 float3, appearing as float3[8]. The array length can be anything. * the default value for each component of the attribute New attributes can also be matrices (done on the Matrix page), like creating a mat4x4.

parameters.name: Attribute Class
parameters.label: Attribute Class
parameters.description: Makes the POP operate on point attributes, vertex attributes or primitive attributes where applicable.

parameters.name: Group
parameters.label: Group
parameters.description: If there are input groups, specifying a group name in this field will cause this POP to act only upon the group specified.

parameters.name: Notification if Attribute Exists
parameters.label: Notification if Attribute Exists
parameters.description: Whether to display a notification if the attribute already exists on the input.

parameters.name: Override if Attribute Exists
parameters.label: Override if Attribute Exists
parameters.description: When on, overrides an input attribute if a new attribute created by this POP has the same name.

parameters.name: Pre-Multiply RGB by Alpha
parameters.label: Pre-Multiply RGB by Alpha
parameters.description: Enable RGB values pre-multiplication with the Alpha.

parameters.name: New Attribute
parameters.label: New Attribute
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks to create new attributes.

parameters.label: Matrix Attribute
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks to create new matrix attributes.

parameters.label: Rename Attribute
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks to rename attributes.

parameters.name: Duplicate Attribute
parameters.label: Duplicate Attribute
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks to duplicate attributes.

parameters.description: List of Point attributes to delete.
